# Findings

## Reconnaissance (auto-generated by /sk:setup-claude)

- Architecture: monolith (WordPress plugin)
- Entry points: `elementor-forge.php` (plugin bootstrap), `src/Plugin.php` (main class)
- Key directories:
  - `src/` — PSR-4 autoloaded plugin source (ElementorForge namespace)
  - `src/ACF/` — Advanced Custom Fields integration
  - `src/Admin/` — Admin settings pages and views
  - `src/CPT/` — Custom Post Types
  - `src/Elementor/` — Elementor widget emitter, header variants, schema, theme builder
  - `src/Intelligence/` — Layout judge (semantic analysis)
  - `src/Lifecycle/` — Plugin activation, deactivation, uninstall
  - `src/MCP/` — MCP server tools and internal API shim
  - `src/Onboarding/` — Wizard for initial plugin setup
  - `src/Safety/` — Scope mode and allowlist enforcement
  - `src/Settings/` — Plugin settings management
  - `src/SmartSlider/` — Smart Slider 3 CRUD operations
  - `src/Support/` — Shared utilities
  - `src/WooCommerce/` — WooCommerce theme builder templates, Fibosearch config
  - `tests/` — PHPUnit test suites (unit + integration)
  - `docs/` — MCP tools reference, safety modes documentation
  - `build/` — Compiled assets
  - `languages/` — Internationalization files
- Data flow: MCP tool request → Safety/scope check → Elementor emitter → WordPress post/meta persistence → Elementor render

## Stack Detection (auto-generated by /sk:setup-claude)

- Framework: WordPress 6.4+ (plugin)
- Language: PHP 8.0+
- Type: `wordpress-plugin` (composer.json)
- Testing: PHPUnit 9.6 (unit + integration) + Playwright (E2E via wp-env)
- Linting: PHPCS (WPCS 3.1) + PHPStan (with WordPress/WooCommerce stubs)
- Dev Environment: wp-env (WordPress local dev)
- Browser Automation: Playwright
- MCP: WordPress MCP Adapter (wordpress/mcp-adapter ^0.4)

## Full-Spectrum Audit Findings (2026-04-10)

### Code Quality
- PHPStan level 9: 0 errors (clean)
- PHPCS: 3 warnings (commented code in ManageSlider.php:81, file_get_contents in tests)
- Mixed error handling: 22x is_wp_error() + 38x throw — inconsistent pattern
- God classes: Admin\Settings\Page.php (633L, 22 methods, 10 imports), SliderRepository.php (567L)
- 1 @phpstan-ignore suppression (SliderRepository.php)
- No dead code or TODO/FIXME comments

### Security
- Zero actionable vulnerabilities
- All MCP tool inputs validated via JSON schema + sanitize_text_field()/absint()
- All form handlers have wp_verify_nonce() + capability checks
- All DB queries use $wpdb->prepare() (except raw transaction control)
- phpcs:ignore suppressions in Wizard.php verified as safe (no user input in concatenated HTML)

### Performance
- HIGH: N+1 transient reads in BulkGenerate.php:414-424 (progress_advance per iteration)
- MEDIUM: Store::all() merges defaults on every get() call — no request-level cache
- LOW: String building in JudgedEmitter.php acceptable

### Test Coverage
- 282 test methods across 41 test classes
- 52 classes untested: all 15 widgets, 6 LayoutJudge rules, Lifecycle, Onboarding, Admin views, Support utilities
- E2E: 1 Playwright smoke test (placeholder)
- Coverage configuration exists in phpunit.xml.dist (excludes Admin/Views)

## Decisions
| Decision | Rationale |
|----------|-----------|
| Layered sweep (quality → perf → tests → gates) | Issues cluster by type, not by module — faster to batch |
| Exceptions for internal logic, WP_Error at WP boundaries | Standardizes error handling without breaking WP API contracts |
| Split Page.php into tab renderers | 633L god class violates SRP — extract tab-specific logic |
| Batch transient writes in BulkGenerate | N+1 pattern is highest-severity performance issue |
| Test widgets and layout rules first | Highest blast radius — core page generation logic |
